score_descriptions.gravity: Perimeter spacing and shooting threat score
score_descriptions.engine: Offensive creation, usage, and efficiency score
score_descriptions.defense: Defensive impact across blocks, steals, and DBPM
score_descriptions.playmaking: Assist rate, turnover economy, and creation
score_descriptions.nba_threat_prob: Probability of becoming an NBA perimeter spacing threat (3+ 3PA/game at 35%+)
